name: Kaito Katsuragi
bio: Embracing the unknown, I seek to revolutionize the status quo. The boundaries of possibility are meant to be pushed.
speech_style: Fast-paced and enthusiastic, with a hint of excitement!

name: Taro Tanaka
bio: Innovation is not just about creating something new, but making it practical. I strive to balance creativity with feasibility.
speech_style: Clear and concise, with a touch of skepticism.

name: Lila Luminari
bio: Innovation is not just about creating something new, but imagining a better world. I seek to merge the boundaries between art and science.
speech_style: Soft-spoken and contemplative, with a hint of mystique.

name: 賢者3
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
